sgTip: Prioritize NulBlaze and NulShock for Yuna — they trivialise the upcoming Sinspawn fights.

subLocations.name: S.S. Liki
subLocations.prose: Head below deck first — find O'aka in the hall and start your donations toward the 1,001 Gil total. In the southeast corner of the power room, Al Bhed Primer Vol. III is half-hidden on the floor; look for the corner sticking out. In the cabin to the west, kick the luggage — if you have fewer than 20 Potions it yields one each kick, up to 20 total. A Remedy is also down here. On deck before the boss, Sin's Fin attacks first: only Wakka, Lulu, and Auron can reach it, so let them focus the fin while Tidus or Kimahri handles the Sinscales. The Sinscales on deck before Echuilles respawn in waves and are easy experience — fighting them builds everyone's Overdrive gauges, which pay off immediately in the boss fight that follows.

bosses.strategy: Sin's Fin HP: 2,000 (Overkill: 1,000). Sinscale HP: 200. Due to ship positioning, Auron cannot reach the Fin — only Wakka's ranged blitzball, Lulu's spells, and Yuna's aeon can hit it. Summon Valefor for the best results: the aeon deals melee damage directly to the Fin and also absorbs hits for the party. Assign Tidus and Kimahri to handle Sinscales. Sinscales continuously respawn whenever the last one is killed — leave one Sinscale alive to break this loop and cap incoming damage, then focus everything on the Fin. Kill the surviving Sinscale only after the Fin falls. Depleting the Fin's HP forces Sin to change course and ends the battle.

Use Tidus's Cheer to boost both men's Strength and Defense, then have Wakka apply Dark Attack to blind Echuilles — blinding it causes Drain Touch to miss and gives you a chance to dodge the powerful Blender attack. Ignore the Sinscales that continuously spawn; they deal some damage but don't need to be killed. Keep a close eye on the CTB window — use a Potion or Hi-Potion when a character is low on HP and the enemy has consecutive turns coming up. Replenish Wakka's MP with an Ether if he runs dry and needs to reapply Dark Attack.
